errors.CALLBACK_URL_REQUIRED: Missing required information. Please try again.
errors.CREDENTIAL_ACCOUNT_NOT_FOUND: No account found with those credentials.

errors.DEFAULT: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.EMAIL_CAN_NOT_BE_UPDATED: This account’s email cannot be changed.
errors.EMAIL_MISMATCH: The email doesn’t match. Please check and try again.
errors.EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Your email is not verified. Please check your inbox.
errors.FAILED_TO_CREATE_SESSION: We couldn’t start your session. Please try again.
errors.FAILED_TO_CREATE_USER: We couldn’t create your account. Please try again.
errors.FAILED_TO_CREATE_VERIFICATION: We couldn’t process the verification. Please try again.
errors.FAILED_TO_GET_SESSION: We couldn’t retrieve your session. Please try again.
errors.FAILED_TO_GET_USER_INFO: We couldn’t retrieve your account information.
errors.FAILED_TO_UNLINK_LAST_ACCOUNT: You can’t unlink your last connected account.
errors.FAILED_TO_UPDATE_USER: We couldn’t update your profile. Please try again.
errors.INVALID_BACKUP_CODE: The backup code you entered is invalid.
errors.INVALID_CALLBACK_URL: Invalid return URL. Please try again.
errors.INVALID_CODE: The verification code you entered is incorrect.
errors.INVALID_TWO_FACTOR_COOKIE: Your verification session is invalid. Please request a new code.

errors.METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED_DEFER_SESSION_REQUIRE: This action isn’t available with the current configuration.
errors.OTP_HAS_EXPIRED: The verification code has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.PASSWORD_ALREADY_SET: A password is already set for this account.

errors.SESSION_NOT_FRESH: For security reasons, please sign in again to continue.

errors.TOKEN_EXPIRED: This link or code has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.TOO_MANY_ATTEMPTS_REQUEST_NEW_CODE: Too many attempts. Please request a new verification code.
errors.USER_ALREADY_EXISTS_USE_ANOTHER_EMAIL: An account already exists with this email. Use another email or sign in.
errors.USER_ALREADY_EXISTS: An account already exists with this email.
errors.USER_ALREADY_HAS_PASSWORD: A password is already set. Please enter it to continue.
errors.USER_EMAIL_NOT_FOUND: We couldn’t find your email address.
errors.USER_NOT_FOUND: No account found with those details.
errors.VALIDATION_ERROR: Some information is invalid. Please review the form.
